nodes.proof: unfold E.isSubsetOf. intros x h. apply In_Th. destruct h as [xs [hxs hle]]. unfold NW in hxs, hle. hauto lq: on use: andsB_le_iff, @alpha_equiv_eq_intro, @extend_alpha_proves unfold: E.In.
attempts: intros b Hcl. unfold cl in Hcl. destruct Hcl as [xs [Hcond Hle]]. simpl in Hcond, Hle. apply andsB_le_iff in Hle. destruct Hle as [S [Hrep HSproves]]. sfirstorder.

intros b Hcl. unfold cl in Hcl. destruct Hcl as [xs [Hxs Hle]]. apply In_Th. destruct (andsB_le_iff xs b) as [Hforward _]. destruct (Hforward Hle) as [X' [Hrep Hp]]. apply (extend_infers X' X b Hp). intros p HpX'. apply Hxs. sfirstorder.

unfold E.isSubsetOf; intros x H; destruct H as [xs [Hxs Hle]]; apply In_Th; eapply proves_mp; [eapply proves_impl; eassumption | eapply proves_conj; intros a Ha; eapply proves_hyp; eapply Hxs; eassumption].
unfold E.isSubsetOf. intros x h. apply In_Th. destruct h as [xs [hxs hle]]. unfold NW in hxs, hle. hauto lq: on use: andsB_le_iff, @alpha_equiv_eq_intro, @extend_alpha_proves unfold: E.In.
failed_attempts: unfold E.isSubsetOf; intros x H; destruct H as [xs [Hxs Hle]]; apply In_Th; eapply proves_mp; [eapply proves_impl; eassumption | eapply proves_conj; intros a Ha; eapply proves_hyp; eapply Hxs; eassumption].
